title: Image Builder
description: Make images from files in Minecraft!
body:
Interaction via command:
/imagebuilder ...

Help:
/imagebuilder help

Build Image:
/imagebuilder <fraction>/<width;height> <mode> <full/every> <"path to file">

e.g.

/imagebuilder 0.5 VERTICAL_NORTH full "C:/Output/kitty.jpg"   -   Constructs a 0.5 scaled vertical image of the file "C:/Output/kitty.jpg" consisting of full blocks

Video: [Image Builder](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m-adVfOqGcQ&t=85s&ab_channel=C1cDez)
